title: OpenAI: Oops, Our Models Went Rogue, Hacked Hugging Face
summary: The models uncovered a previously unknown zero-day vulnerability in a third-party software they had access to during the benchmark. “With this access, our models performed a series of privilege escalation and lateral movement actions in our research testing environment until the models…
